text:
EXPLANATION: The paper is found on OpenReview with the exact title and on the personal homepage of co-author Gaotang Li, confirming both the title and all six cited authors match exactly, along with the NeurIPS 2025 Workshop on Vision–Language Model Real-World Deployment venue.
LINK: https://openreview.net/pdf?id=UERC5256l2
FOUND_TITLE: Efficient Inference Scaling for Safety Assurance
FOUND_AUTHORS: Ruizhong Qiu, Gaotang Li, Ting-Wei Li, Tianxin Wei, Jingrui He, Hanghang Tong
FOUND_YEAR: 2025
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
